globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://cloudflareinsights.com; img-src 'self' data:;
